# Project blueprint

<!-- mol:map:managed begin -->
<!-- This block is regenerated by /mol:map. Custom annotations go
     OUTSIDE these markers and are preserved across re-runs. -->

_Generated 2026-05-08 by /mol:map (workflow scope)._

## Inventory

### Layer 1 — Workflow (`src/molexp/workflow/`)

#### Boundary with pydantic-graph

molexp.workflow owns the scheduler; pydantic-graph provides only the state-machine harness and the `BaseStatePersistence` base. `WorkflowStep` (in `_pydantic_graph/node.py`) is the **single** `pg.BaseNode` molexp exposes; pg drives `WorkflowStep(0) → WorkflowStep(1) → … → End` purely as a frame harness, and every per-task invocation, ready-set computation, parallel fan-out, `wf.loop` counter, and `Next(label)` route is molexp-owned scheduling logic running inside `WorkflowStep.run`. `Task` / `Actor` are plain `abc.ABC` subclasses (NOT pg `BaseNode` subclasses); the scheduler dispatches `execute(ctx)` / `run(ctx)` via duck typing through `_invoke_body_with_ctx`. The compiler stores user-registered objects directly under `compiled.task_by_name`; no per-task pg codegen, no `Graph(nodes=[...])` of trampoline subclasses. `End` is a re-export of `pydantic_graph.End` (runtime invariant `molexp.workflow.End is pydantic_graph.End`). `Next(label)` is an IR-internal routing token (used by `wf.loop` / `wf.branch` / proposal compiler); intentionally absent from `molexp.workflow.__all__` — reach for it via `from molexp.workflow.types import Next` only when implementing declarative-IR machinery. workflow/ MUST NOT import from `molexp.workspace.*` or `molexp.agent.*` — enforced by `tests/test_workflow/test_import_guard.py`; cross-layer payloads ride duck-typed `run_context` (opaque) or `Mapping[str, Any]` config. See § Workflow ↔ pydantic-graph boundary in CLAUDE.md.

#### workflow — top-level public OOP API for DAG-based workflow definition + execution

- **Public surface:** `Runnable`, `Streamable`, `Task`, `Actor`, `TaskContext`, `ActorContext`, `Workflow`, `WorkflowSpec`, `WorkflowCompiler`, `default_compiler`, `WorkflowResult`, `WorkflowExecution`, `TaskTypeRegistry`, `default_registry`, `Caching`, `TaskSnapshot`, `make_execution_id`, `End` (re-export of `pydantic_graph.End`), `UnconditionalEdges`, `BranchEdges`, `OutEdges`, error hierarchy (`WorkflowError`, `CycleError`, `EdgeShapeError`, `EntryAmbiguousError`, `UnknownTaskError`, `UnreachableTaskError`, `UnknownRouteError`, `MissingRouteError`, `WorkflowDeadlockError`, `ParallelExecutionError`, `LoopMaxItersExceeded`), versioning (`TaskTopologyEntry`, `WorkflowVersion`, `WorkflowVersionConflictError`). `Next` is intentionally NOT in `__all__`.
- **Style summary:** explicit `__all__` listing public names in grouped sections (Protocols / Bases / Contexts / Building / Compiler / Execution / Registry / Utilities / End / Edges / Errors / Warnings / Versioning); `PascalCase` types, `snake_case` callables; pure re-export, no logic.
- **Layer role:** Workflow / public API root. Sole supported import path for downstream layers (Agent, Workspace, Server, UI).

#### workflow.spec — `Workflow` + `WorkflowSpec` builder, decorators, control-flow primitives

- **Public surface:** `Workflow` (decorator + builder OOP class with `.task` / `.actor` / `.add` / `.entry` / `.control` / `.branch` / `.loop` / `.parallel` / `.reduce` / `.build`), `WorkflowSpec` (`.execute` / `.start` / `.version` / `.to_dict` / `.from_dict` / `.run_reducer` / `.reducer_dimension`); internal `LoopDecl`, `ParallelDecl`, `TaskRegistration` (`__slots__` declarations).
- **Style summary:** `Workflow` is a plain class accumulating decorator/OOP registrations; `WorkflowSpec` is a frozen pydantic model with content-hashed `workflow_id`; builder mutators return `self` for chaining; `.build()` calls compile-time validation eagerly via `WorkflowGraphCompiler`. Raises `TypeError` for mutually exclusive kwargs (`routes=` vs `next_=`), `ValueError` for cardinality / serializability violations, `WorkflowError` subtypes on invalid topology.
- **Layer role:** Workflow / authoring façade. Cited under "What must never change casually" in CLAUDE.md.

#### workflow.compiler — IR ↔ Python ↔ Mermaid ↔ Spec compiler

- **Public surface:** `WorkflowCompiler` (instance methods `ir_to_python` / `python_to_ir` / `ir_to_spec` / `spec_to_ir` / `spec_to_python` / `spec_to_mermaid` / `ir_to_mermaid`), module-level `default_compiler` singleton; `__all__ = ["WorkflowCompiler", "default_compiler"]`.
- **Style summary:** stateless instance methods named `<from>_to_<to>`; AST-only — never `exec`s user input; module-private helpers `_safe_literal_repr`, `_mermaid_id`; raises `ValueError` / `WorkflowError` on malformed IR or non-literal Python.
- **Layer role:** Workflow / surface conversion. The agent layer (downstream) builds on top via its own `proposal_compiler`; the workflow layer remains agent-unaware.

#### workflow.task / workflow.context / workflow.protocols — base classes + structural protocols

- **Public surface:** `Task[StateT, DepsT, InputT, OutputT]`, `Actor[StateT, DepsT, InputT, OutputT]` (abstract base classes with `@abstractmethod async def execute(ctx)` / `run(ctx)`); `TaskContext` (read-only properties `state` / `deps` / `inputs` / `config` / `run_context`); `ActorContext` (adds async `receive()` / `send()`); `Runnable` and `Streamable` `@runtime_checkable` `Protocol`s with `ctx: Any` (deliberately loose to avoid forcing third-party imports of molexp).
- **Style summary:** `Task` / `Actor` are plain `abc.ABC` subclasses (NOT pg `BaseNode` — single-track contract; the molexp scheduler invokes their `execute` / `run` directly via duck typing). Contexts are plain classes carrying exactly five attributes — `state`, `deps`, `inputs`, `config` (a `Mapping[str, Any]`), optional opaque `run_context`. No workspace plumbing on `TaskContext` (`artifact` / `log` / `find_asset` / `checkpoint` / `set_result` / `get_result` are gone). `ActorContext.send` / `receive` raise `NotImplementedError` when the duck-typed `run_context` does not expose `.emit` / `.receive`.
- **Layer role:** Workflow / contracts for user-defined units of work. Opaque `run_context` is the documented duck-typed escape hatch for upstream layers (workspace plumbing rides through here).

#### workflow.types — result / execution-handle types and shared vocabulary

- **Public surface:** `StateT`, `DepsT`, `InputT`, `OutputT` `TypeVar`s; `Next` (IR-internal routing token, NOT exported from `__init__`); `End` (re-export of `pydantic_graph.End`); edge sum types `UnconditionalEdges` / `BranchEdges` / `OutEdges`; error hierarchy under `WorkflowError`; `LoopMaxItersExceeded` warning; `WorkflowResult` (frozen pydantic), `WorkflowExecution` (plain runtime container with `wait()` / `cancel()`).
- **Style summary:** value types are `BaseModel(model_config=ConfigDict(frozen=True, extra="forbid"))`; runtime container `WorkflowExecution` is a plain class because it holds live asyncio state; error class names follow `<Verb>Error`; edge sum types follow `<Noun>Edges`. Owns the `End` re-export contract; hides `Next` from the public surface.
- **Layer role:** Workflow / core data contracts.

#### workflow.cache / workflow.snapshot — content-addressed cache + AST-normalized identity

- **Public surface:** `Caching` (file-backed LRU cache: `initialize` / `get` / `put` / `invalidate` / `clear` / `stats`), `CacheEntry` (pydantic), `CACHE_FORMAT_VERSION`; `TaskSnapshot` frozen pydantic with `.create(task)` classmethod, `.key` property.
- **Style summary:** `Caching` is keyed by AST-normalized code hash + config hash; module-private `_robust_json_default` / `_atomic_write` helpers; swallows corruption on read with logged warning + entry deletion (never raises read-side); atomic `tmp → os.replace` writes. `TaskSnapshot.create` runs an AST → bytecode → class-identity fallback chain with logged warnings; never raises.
- **Layer role:** Workflow / supporting infrastructure (referenced from CLAUDE.md § Key Patterns / cache key composition).

#### workflow.registry — slug → factory mapping for IR-driven assembly

- **Public surface:** `TaskTypeRegistry` (`register` / `get` / `has` / `slugs` / `describe` / `items`), `TaskFactory` type alias, module-level `default_registry` singleton pre-loaded with `core.constant` / `core.add` / `core.multiply`; `__all__ = ["TaskFactory", "TaskTypeRegistry", "default_registry"]`.
- **Style summary:** slugs are dotted `<namespace>.<name>` lowercase; optional decorator form (`@registry.register("core.add")`) auto-detects class vs callable; `KeyError` with sorted "registered types" hint on `get` miss.
- **Layer role:** Workflow / public registry — consumed by IR-driven assembly (`WorkflowSpec.from_dict`) and by the server's `/api/registry` route (downstream).

#### workflow.version — pure-data versioning record

- **Public surface:** `WorkflowVersion` and `TaskTopologyEntry` (frozen pydantic), `WorkflowVersionConflictError`, constants `VERSION_SCHEMA_VERSION` / `VERSIONS_DIRNAME` / `WORKFLOWS_SUBDIR`.
- **Style summary:** pure data, no I/O — the workflow layer no longer writes records to disk; persistence is explicitly the workspace layer's responsibility per the module docstring.
- **Layer role:** Workflow / pure-data versioning record.

#### workflow._pydantic_graph — private engine (single-track edition)

- **Public surface:** parent re-exports `make_execution_id` only. Internal symbols `WorkflowGraphCompiler`, `GraphWorkflowRuntime`, `RunStorePersistence`, `WorkflowStep`, `CompiledWorkflow`, `WorkflowState`, `WorkflowDeps` are imported by `workflow/spec.py` and `workflow/__init__.py` only — never directly by external callers.
- **Style summary:** `WorkflowStep` is the **single** pg `BaseNode` molexp exposes (`@dataclass` per pg's contract for nodes); the runtime constructs a module-level `Graph(nodes=[WorkflowStep])` and drives `WorkflowStep(0) → WorkflowStep(1) → … → End` for snapshot/resume bookkeeping. `WorkflowGraphCompiler.compile(spec) -> CompiledWorkflow` runs four stages — `_validate_data_dag`, `_compile_edge_sets`, `_resolve_entry_frontier`, `_check_reachability` — and stores user-registered Task / Actor / callable directly under `compiled.task_by_name` (no per-task pg codegen, no `Graph(nodes=[...])` of trampoline subclasses). `WorkflowStep._invoke_one` cascades through `Task` → `Actor` → `Runnable` → `Streamable` → callable for body dispatch; `_classify_return` normalises returns into `(value, Dispatch)` where `Dispatch` is `TakeAll | TakeLabel | TakeEnd`. The scheduler does data-deps + topological-level batching, `wf.parallel` fan-out under `asyncio.Semaphore(max_concurrency)` (per-element exceptions captured into `ParallelExecutionError`), and `wf.loop` `max_iters` guarding (forces `Next("exit")` + emits `LoopMaxItersExceeded`). `RunStorePersistence` extends `pydantic_graph.persistence.BaseStatePersistence` and writes a single `workflow.json` per execution under `run_dir/executions/<execution_id>/` via atomic `tmp → os.replace`. `WorkflowState` is a mutable dataclass whose mutators return new instances (immutable update pattern), with one explicit `_sync_from` mutation site documented as required by pg's reference semantics. Errors raised: `UnknownTaskError`, `MissingRouteError`, `UnknownRouteError`, `WorkflowDeadlockError`, `ParallelExecutionError` with index-keyed failure maps; `CycleError` / `EdgeShapeError` / `EntryAmbiguousError` / `UnreachableTaskError` from compile-time validation.
- **Layer role:** Private implementation — do not import directly. Public via `molexp.workflow`.

#### workflow.schema — JSON-Schema wire-format contracts

- **Public surface:** `workflow.json`, `task_config.json`, `link.json` (JSON Schema Draft-07 documents composed via `$ref`), plus `README.md` covering slugs, status enums, ID patterns, and an example workflow.
- **Style summary:** lowercase `<concept>.json`; explicit `$id` and `$ref` composition.
- **Layer role:** Workflow-layer wire-format contracts — the agent layer (downstream) emits to these schemas; the server layer (further downstream) round-trips IR through them.

---

### Layer 2 — Agent (`src/molexp/agent/`)

#### agent — package root, harness public surface

- **Public surface:** `Agent`, `AgentService`, `AgentSession`, `Goal`, `Message`, `Usage`, `AgentMode`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `ToolSpec`, `ToolResult`, `ToolContext`, `ToolCallable`, `ToolRegistry`, `ToolSchema`, `native_tool`, `DuplicateToolError`, `ModelClient`, `ModelClientFactory`, `ModelConfig`, `ModelEvent`, `ModelRequest`, `ModelResponse`, `ModelToolCall`, `ProviderConfigValidator`, `create_model_client`, `register_model_provider`, `list_providers`, `UnknownProviderError`, `ToolSource`, `register_tool_source`, `list_tool_sources`, `UnknownToolSourceError`, `replan`, all `planning` re-exports (`PlanSession`, `PlanDriver`, `PlanStore`, `PlanEvent`, `Evidence`, `EvidenceStore`, `CapabilityGate`, `ApprovalDecision`, `ProtocolDraft`, `ReplanProposal`, etc.).
- **Style summary:** value types are `BaseModel(frozen=True)` (per CLAUDE.md rule: `arbitrary_types_allowed=True` is forbidden in this package); runtime containers are plain Python classes; lazy provider import (`molexp.agent` itself does not pull in `pydantic_ai`/HTTP clients/SDKs); enforced by `tests/test_agent/test_import_guard.py`.
- **Layer role:** Agent / public façade.

#### agent.factory — `Agent(provider=...)` resolver

- **Public surface:** `Agent` (singleton `_AgentFactory`).
- **Style summary:** lazy `importlib` resolution; static `_PROVIDERS` dispatch table mapping `"claude"|"codex"|"pydanticai"` to plugin module path; `resolve_only=True` returns the class without spawning; raises `ValueError` on unknown provider.
- **Layer role:** Agent / unified provider façade.

#### agent.service / agent.orchestration — LLM-driven harness core

- **Public surface:** `AgentService` (workspace-scoped facade), `AgentSession`, `AgentRunner`, `EventBus`, `SessionEvent` (discriminated union: `SessionStarted`, `TurnStarted`, `ContextBuilt`, `ModelRequested`, `ModelResponded`, `ToolCallRequested`, `ToolCallCompleted`, `ToolApprovalRequested`, `UserMessageRequested`, `UserMessageReceived`, `PlanCreated`, `PlanDecided`, `FailureRecorded`, `SessionCompleted`), `ApprovalRegistry`, `UserMessageRegistry`, `ChatGateway`, `SessionApprovalGate`, `SessionChatGateway`, `PlanState`, `PlanStateMachine`, `render_reject_feedback`.
- **Style summary:** `AgentService` is a plain class owning live session registry + asyncio task drivers; sessions own per-session `EventBus`, `inbox`, `approvals`, `user_inbox`, `plan` state machine; events are `BaseModel(frozen=True)` discriminated by `Literal` `event` field; HITL via async futures parked on registries.
- **Layer role:** Agent / orchestration core.

#### agent.model / agent.model_registry — model-boundary contract + plugin registry

- **Public surface:** `ModelClient` (Protocol), `ModelClientFactory`, `ModelConfig`, `ModelRequest`, `ModelResponse`, `ModelEvent`, `ModelToolCall`, `ModelBudget`, `ToolSchema`, `ProviderConfigValidator`, `create_model_client`, `register_model_provider`, `list_providers`, `UnknownProviderError`.
- **Style summary:** `ModelClient` is a `runtime_checkable Protocol`; all wire types are `BaseModel(frozen=True)`; thread-safe registry (lock-protected dict); plugins register themselves on import via `register_model_provider`.
- **Layer role:** Agent / model-plugin boundary (provider-agnostic).

#### agent.coding_protocol — coding-agent CLI plugin contract

- **Public surface:** `CodingAgentClient` (Protocol), `TurnResult`, `AgentError`, `AgentTurnInputRequiredError`, `AgentEventCallback`, `emit_event`, `drain_stderr`, `terminate_subprocess`.
- **Style summary:** runtime-checkable `Protocol`; `TurnResult` is `BaseModel(frozen=True)`; shared subprocess helpers reused by every CLI provider; providers must not import from each other.
- **Layer role:** Agent / coding-agent plugin boundary.

#### agent.types / agent._serialize / agent.settings — core data contracts

- **Public surface:** `AgentMode`, `Goal`, `Message`, `Usage`, `AgentFailure`, `FailureKind`, `SessionStatus`, `utc_now`, `JsonValue`, `AgentSettings`.
- **Style summary:** `BaseModel(frozen=True)`; `Enum` / `StrEnum` for status; pydantic-only — no SDK / HTTP imports allowed (import-guard enforced).
- **Layer role:** Agent / shared data contracts.

#### agent.tools — tool registry, dispatcher, policy, native tools

- **Public surface:** `ToolSpec`, `ToolResult`, `ToolContext`, `ToolCallable`, `RegisteredTool`, `ToolRegistry`, `ToolDispatcher`, `ToolPolicy`, `PERMISSIVE_POLICY`, `READ_ONLY_POLICY`, `ApprovalDecision`, `ApprovalGate`, `AutoApproveGate`, `DenyAllGate`, `ToolEventCallback`, `ToolSource`, `register_tool_source`, `native_tool`, `DuplicateToolError`, `is_native_tool`, `get_native_spec`.
- **Style summary:** `@native_tool` only tags callables — does NOT register on a global; each `AgentService` instance owns its own `ToolRegistry`; `ToolSpec` / `ToolResult` are frozen pydantic models; explicit registration prevents test contamination.
- **Layer role:** Agent / tool layer.

#### agent.planning — Scientific Plan Mode subsystem

- **Public surface:** `PlanSpec`, `PlanPatch`, `PlanPreview`, `PlanSession`, `PlanStore`, `PlanDriver`, `PlanModeRunner`, `PlanConfig`, `PlanResult`, `PlanCancelled`, `PlanSessionSnapshot`, `PlanEvent` (union), `PlanningInvoker`, `PlanningPrompt`, `CapabilityGate`, `CapabilityLevel`, `CapabilityDenied`, `ToolCapabilityRequirement`, `Evidence`, `EvidenceStore`, `EvidenceKind`, `ExperimentalDesignSpec`, `GoalSpec`, `IntakeDocument`, `IntakeError`, `ProtocolDraft`, `ProtocolStage`, `ProtocolStageKind`, `ApprovalDecision`, `ApprovalRequested`, `Approver`, `ArtifactWriter`, `AutoApprover`, `EventSink`, `ReplanProposal`, `CodeArtifactRecord`, `GATES`, `NODE_ORDER`, `STRONG_MODEL_NODES`, provider-config types (`AnthropicProviderConfig`, `ClaudeCliProviderConfig`, `CodexCliProviderConfig`, etc.), `apply_plan_patch`, `make_plan_spec`, `build_planning_workflow`, `load_intake_document`.
- **Style summary:** `PlanSpec` and progress represented by stable node ids in `planning_workflow`; pydantic-validated specs and patches; node graph driven by a planning-workflow IR; provider-agnostic invoker abstraction; raises typed `PlanModeError` / `IntakeError` / `CapabilityDenied`.
- **Layer role:** Agent / plan-mode subsystem (consumed by orchestration runner).

#### agent.modes — generic mode framework over plan/critique/replay

- **Public surface:** `Mode`, `ModeDriver`, `PlanMode`.
- **Style summary:** declarative `Mode` description + generic `ModeDriver` Protocol; plan mode is one instance of `Mode`.
- **Layer role:** Agent / mode abstraction (frame around planning).

#### agent.context — context packet, compression, prompt composer

- **Public surface:** `ContextManager`, `DefaultContextManager`, `ContextBudget`, `ContextBuildRequest`, `ContextPacket`, `ContextRef`, `ContextCompressor`, `NoopCompressor`, `TailCompressor`, `PromptComposer`, `PromptLayer`.
- **Style summary:** packets are `BaseModel(frozen=True)`; pluggable compressors; deterministic packet construction.
- **Layer role:** Agent / context-management subsystem.

#### agent.sessions / agent.persistence — session metadata + JSONL streams + tiered store

- **Public surface:** `SessionMetadata`, `SessionStore`, `MigrationResult`, `migrate_legacy_sessions`, `ResourceSpec`, `Scope`, `TieredResourceStore`, `tiered_router_factory`.
- **Style summary:** atomic JSON writes (temp-file + rename); JSONL append-only event streams; three-tier (registrations / user / workspace) generic store.
- **Layer role:** Agent / persistence subsystem.

#### agent.skills — slash-invokable saved-behaviour bundles

- **Public surface:** `Skill`, `SkillStore`, `ParsedCommand`, `CommandKind`, `parse`, `RESERVED_SLASH_NAMES`, `SLASH_NAME_RE`, `SKILLS_FILE`, `USER_HOME_SKILLS_FILE`, `USER_HOME_DIR_NAME`.
- **Style summary:** importing the package side-effect-registers native skills; pydantic types for `Skill`; regex-validated slash names.
- **Layer role:** Agent / skill subsystem.

#### agent.recovery — error hierarchy + retry policies

- **Public surface:** `AgentError`, `ApprovalDenied`, `ContextOverflow`, `InvalidPlan`, `ModelFailure`, `PolicyDenied`, `ToolFailure`, `ToolNotFound`, `UserCancelled`, `WorkspaceConflict`, `ConstraintSet`, `RecoveryPolicy`, `NoRetryPolicy`, `SimpleRetryPolicy`, `RetryDecision`.
- **Style summary:** typed exception hierarchy rooted at `AgentError`; immutable `ConstraintSet`; policy classes with `retry(error) -> RetryDecision`.
- **Layer role:** Agent / failure-handling subsystem.

#### agent.memory / agent.observability — append-only logs, traces, evals

- **Public surface:** `MemoryStore`, `JsonlMemoryStore`, `NoopMemoryStore`, `MemoryRecord`, `Evaluator`, `NoopEvaluator`, `EvalResult`, `TraceSink`, `JsonlTraceSink`, `NoopTraceSink`, `TraceRecord`, `UsageAccumulator`.
- **Style summary:** append-only JSONL stores; `Noop` defaults; pydantic record types; pluggable sinks.
- **Layer role:** Agent / observability subsystem.

#### agent.mcp — MCP tool source, server/secret store, OAuth integration

- **Public surface:** `McpToolSource`, `McpStore`, `McpServerEntry`, `McpScope`, `McpSecretsStore`, `McpServerToolList`, `McpToolSummary`, `ProbeOutcome`, `OAuthFlowSession`, `OAuthSessionRegistry`, `FileTokenStorage`, `build_oauth_provider`, `default_redirect_uri`, `session_registry`, `storage_for`, `list_mcp_tools`, `probe_server`, `UnresolvedSecretError`, `MCP_CONFIG_FILENAME`, `MCP_SECRETS_FILENAME`, `SOURCE_NAME`, `PROBE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`, `START_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`.
- **Style summary:** importing the package self-registers `McpToolSource` via `register_tool_source`; MCP SDK + httpx imported lazily inside methods (keeps `molexp.agent` stdlib-only); workspace + user-home tier stores.
- **Layer role:** Agent / opt-in MCP integration.

#### agent.replan / agent.sandbox — research-orchestration primitives

- **Public surface:** `replan`, `run_in_sandbox`, `SandboxResult`.
- **Style summary:** functional API; `replan` returns a fresh sibling `Run` with `replanned_from` / `replanned_reason` provenance labels; sandbox is a subprocess + filesystem-allow-list shim (not OS-level isolation).
- **Layer role:** Agent / research-orchestration primitives.

#### Agent providers (`src/molexp/plugins/agent_*`)

##### plugins.agent_claude — Claude CLI as a coding-agent plugin

- **Public surface:** `ClaudeCliClient`, `ClaudeCliConfig`, `SubagentDef`.
- **Style summary:** spawns `claude` CLI per turn; streams `--output-format stream-json` events; multi-turn continuation via UUID `--session-id` / `--resume`; strips `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` to preserve subscription auth.
- **Layer role:** Agent / coding-agent provider plugin (implements `CodingAgentClient`).

##### plugins.agent_codex — Codex app-server as a coding-agent plugin

- **Public surface:** `CodexAppServerClient`, `CodexConfig`, `ToolHandler`.
- **Style summary:** long-lived subprocess driven via JSON-RPC over stdio; reverse-RPC tool calls dispatched through a caller-supplied `ToolHandler`.
- **Layer role:** Agent / coding-agent provider plugin (implements `CodingAgentClient`).

##### plugins.agent_pydanticai — PydanticAI as a `ModelClient` plugin

- **Public surface:** `PydanticAIModelClient`, `PydanticAIModelClientFactory`, `PydanticAIProviderValidator`, `ProviderStore`, `SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS`, `DEFAULT_MODELS`, `CredentialStatus`, `ProbeResult`, `ProviderConfigPublic`, `check_credentials`, `probe_provider`, `to_public`, `mask_api_key`.
- **Style summary:** importing the package self-registers every `SUPPORTED_PROVIDERS` factory + validator on `register_model_provider`; plugin owns `model_io.jsonl` and `provider_blobs/`; private `_pydantic_ai/` module.
- **Layer role:** Agent / model provider plugin (implements `ModelClient`).

---

### Layer 3 — Workspace (`src/molexp/workspace/`)

#### workspace — file-system-backed `Workspace → Project → Experiment → Run` hierarchy

- **Public surface:** `Workspace`, `Project`, `Experiment`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `RunStatus`, `WorkspaceMetadata`, `ProjectMetadata`, `ExperimentMetadata`, `RunMetadata`, `ExecutionRecord`, `ErrorInfo`, `WorkflowSnapshotRef`, `ComputeTarget`, target helpers (`add_target`, `get_target`, `has_target`, `list_targets`, `remove_target`, `target_run_dir`, `to_transport`), all asset types (`Asset`, `ArtifactAsset`, `AssetCatalog`, `AssetManifest`, `AssetScope`, `AssetsView`, `CheckpointAsset`, `DataAsset`, `DataAssetLibrary`, `ErrorTraceAsset`, `ExecutionStateAsset`, `LogAsset`, `OutputAsset`, `Producer`), `ParamSpace`, `Params`, `GridSpace`, `UniformSpace`, `Context`.
- **Style summary:** entities are plain Python classes (own filesystem state + lazy materialization); metadata models are `BaseModel(frozen=True)`; constructors side-effect-free except `Workspace` (anchor); child factories (`workspace.project()`, etc.) are idempotent get-or-create-by-slug; all JSON writes atomic via temp-file + `os.rename`; `RunContext` is an `async with` context manager owning execution lifecycle.
- **Layer role:** Workspace / public hierarchy + persistence.

#### workspace.assets — typed Asset hierarchy + per-scope manifest + workspace catalog

- **Public surface:** `Asset` (base), `ArtifactAsset`, `CheckpointAsset`, `DataAsset`, `ErrorTraceAsset`, `ExecutionStateAsset`, `LogAsset`, `OutputAsset`, `AssetCatalog`, `AssetManifest`, `AssetsView`, `AssetScope`, `Producer`, `DataAssetLibrary`, `ImportAction`, `ArtifactAccessor`, `CheckpointAccessor`, `LogAccessor`, `ASSET_ADAPTER`, `AnyAsset`, `parse_asset`, `lineage`.
- **Style summary:** content-hashed (deduplicated by SHA256); discriminated union via pydantic `TypeAdapter`; per-scope manifest + workspace-level catalog; canonical owner of asset/artifact concept (workflow + agent layers reference assets via id, not type import).
- **Layer role:** Workspace / typed asset model.

#### workspace.run / workspace.experiment / workspace.project / workspace.workspace / workspace.targets / workspace.param / workspace.resume_policy / workspace.checkpoint / workspace.context / workspace.models / workspace.base / workspace.utils / workspace.schema_version — entity + helper modules

- **Public surface:** entity classes listed above; `ResumePolicy` protocol; `slugify`; private helpers `_save_metadata`, `_load_metadata`, `_list_children`, `_rebuild_container_index`, `_reconstruct` (used inside the package).
- **Style summary:** plain classes for entities; pydantic `BaseModel(frozen=True)` for metadata; protocol-based resume policy; UUID-suffixed slugs to avoid collisions; on-disk layout with per-attempt `executions/exec-<id>/` subdirectories.
- **Layer role:** Workspace / entity implementations + on-disk layout helpers.

---

### Layer 4 — Server (`src/molexp/server/`)

#### server — FastAPI app factory + lifecycle manager

- **Public surface:** `create_app`, `app` (default dev instance), `ServerManager`, `register_exception_handlers`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings`.
- **Style summary:** all routes mounted under `/api`; SPA fallback for non-API paths in production; CORS for `localhost:3000` / `:5173` in dev; `lifespan` async context manager; bundled UI located via `importlib.resources.files("molexp") / "dist"`.
- **Layer role:** Server / FastAPI application factory.

#### server.routes — modular API routers

- **Public surface:** routers `agent`, `agent_admin`, `agent_tasks`, `asset`, `catalog`, `execution`, `experiment`, `molq`, `project`, `registry`, `reviews`, `run`, `targets`, `workspace`; helpers `agent_task_store`, `review_store`, `_scope`; `create_api_router`.
- **Style summary:** each router is a `fastapi.APIRouter`; explicit Pydantic request/response schemas; error handlers translate molexp exceptions to HTTP status codes; per-router auxiliary stores (e.g. `agent_task_store`, `review_store`) co-located with the route module.
- **Layer role:** Server / route handlers.

#### server.schemas — pydantic request/response models

- **Public surface:** `*Request` and `*Response` pydantic types covering every route (agent, asset, project, experiment, run, workspace, MCP, custom tools, skills, executions, reviews, catalog, molq, targets, workspace runs aggregate); `compute_workspace_runs_stats`.
- **Style summary:** all `BaseModel`; deterministic — exposed via OpenAPI; UI generates TS client against these.
- **Layer role:** Server / API contract.

#### server.handlers / server.exceptions / server.dependencies / server.manager — supporting modules

- **Public surface:** `register_exception_handlers`, `get_workspace`, `get_settings`, `ServerManager`.
- **Style summary:** FastAPI dependency injection; `ServerManager` for lifecycle (start/stop/status/logs); typed exception hierarchy mapped to HTTP responses.
- **Layer role:** Server / supporting infrastructure.

---

### Layer 5 — UI (`ui/src/`)

#### ui.app — three-panel application shell, routing, state, renderers, runs dashboards

- **Public surface (sub-dirs):** `layout/` (`AppShell`, `ErrorBoundary`, `TopBar`, `ContextBar`, `ExecutionConsole`), `panels/` (`CenterPanel`, `LeftPanel`, `RightPanel`, `TreeView`), `renderers/` (`AgentViewer`, `AgentSettingsViewer`, `AssetViewer`, `ExperimentViewer`, `ImageViewer`, `MetadataInspector`, `MetadataViewer`, `PlanCard`, `ProjectViewer`, `RunViewer`, `SnapshotViewer`, `TextEditor`, `WorkflowFileViewer`, `WorkflowGraph`, `WorkflowGraphViewer`, `WorkflowInspector`, `WorkflowSourceViewer`, `WorkflowViewer`, `registerRenderers`, `agentEvents`, `metadata`), `runs/` (`RunsPage`, `DashboardPanel`, `RunsKpiStrip`, `RunsActivityChart`, `RunsAggregateRow`, `RunsFacetPanel`, `RunsGanttChart`, `RunsJobsTable`, `RunsTimelineView`, `RunsRecentEvents`, `RunsStatusProgress`, `RunsTabBar`, `useDashboardLayout`, `useWorkspaceRuns`, `aggregates`, `filterParams`, `statusGroups`), `state/` (`api`, `useNavigationState`, `useWorkspaceState`, `useDiscoveredFileTypes`, `mcpEvents`), `settings/` (`SettingsPage`, `ComputeTargetsPanel`, `AddTargetDialog`, `AddTargetForm`), `oauth/` (`OAuthCallbackPage`), `agent_session/`, `agent_settings/`, `registry`, `types`.
- **Style summary:** React 19 + Rsbuild; functional components with hooks; Zustand for `useWorkspaceState` / `useNavigationState`; `registry.ts` maps entity types to renderer components via plugin contributions; `state/api.ts` wraps the generated OpenAPI client; URL-based routing; immutable updates via spread.
- **Layer role:** UI / main application code.

#### ui.components — shared UI primitives

- **Public surface:** `ConfirmDialog`, `PromptDialog`, plus `components/ui/*` (shadcn-style primitives reused project-wide).
- **Style summary:** functional React components built on `@radix-ui` primitives; controlled props.
- **Layer role:** UI / shared component library.

#### ui.lib — utilities

- **Public surface:** `contribution-registry`, `file-preview-plugins`, `file-type-discovery`, `format-time` (`formatDuration` etc.), `plot`, `utils` (`cn`), `workflow-python`, `workflow-utils`.
- **Style summary:** pure functions; explicit named exports; no side effects.
- **Layer role:** UI / shared utilities.

#### ui.api — auto-generated OpenAPI client

- **Public surface:** `generated/index.ts` re-exports `core/`, `models/`, `services/`.
- **Style summary:** auto-generated by `npm run generate:api` — never edit manually; fetch-based client; typed request/response models matching `server.schemas`.
- **Layer role:** UI / generated API client.

#### ui.plugins — contribution-based plugin system + bundled plugins

- **Public surface:** `contribution-runtime` (registry funcs), `loader`, `runtime`, `types`, plus bundled plugin packages (`core/`, `metrics/`, `molq/`, `molvis/`).
- **Style summary:** `ContributionRegistry<T>` class instances per contribution kind (renderer, file-preview, entity-tab, file-type, execution-column/-detail); plugins call `registerXContribution(...)` at load time; built-in plugins ship inside the main bundle, third-party plugins mounted at `/api/plugins/<id>/`.
- **Layer role:** UI / plugin extension system.

#### ui.resolvers / ui.types / ui.styles / ui.\_\_fixtures\_\_ — supporting modules

- **Public surface:** `BaseResolver`, `ContextResolver`, `DocumentResolver`, `WorkflowResolver`, resolver `types`; root `App.tsx`, `index.tsx`, `env.d.ts`; type modules `documents`, `jsx.d`, `task_graph_ir`.
- **Style summary:** resolver classes for entity → render-target mapping; test fixtures co-located in `__fixtures__/`.
- **Layer role:** UI / supporting modules.

---

### Cross-cutting

#### cli (`src/molexp/cli/`) — Typer-based command-line entry

- **Public surface:** `app` (Typer), command modules `asset`, `experiment`, `explore_cmd`, `project`, `run_cmd`, `runs`, `serve_cmd`, `target_cmd`, `watch_cmd`, `workspace_cmd`, `prune`; helpers `_common`.
- **Style summary:** Typer command registration via side-effect imports; third-party CLI plugins discovered via the `molexp.cli_plugins` entry-point and registered with failure isolation; uses `mollog.get_logger`.
- **Layer role:** Cross-cutting / CLI surface (consumes Workspace + Server + plugins).

#### config (`src/molexp/config/`) — `molcfg.yaml` + named profiles

- **Public surface:** `MolCfg`, `ProfileConfig`, `load_molcfg`, `normalize_profile_name`, `DEFAULT_CONFIG_FILENAMES`.
- **Style summary:** `ProfileConfig` is immutable mapping-like with normalized `name` and deterministic `content_hash`; molexp only carries the profile (does not interpret contents).
- **Layer role:** Cross-cutting / configuration loader (consumed by `Workflow` and CLI).

#### plugins (`src/molexp/plugins/`) — optional capability registry

- **Public surface:** `Capability` (enum), `CapabilityNotAvailable`, `PluginRegistry`, `registry` (singleton), `CliPlugin`, `CLI_PLUGIN_API_VERSION`, `discover_cli_plugins`, `discover_ui_plugin_dirs`; sub-packages `agent_claude`, `agent_codex`, `agent_pydanticai`, `gh`, `metrics`, `submit_molq`.
- **Style summary:** lazy `_LOADERS` dispatch table; `is_available()` probes import without raising; thread-safe singleton; entry-point discovery for CLI and UI plugins.
- **Layer role:** Cross-cutting / optional-capability registry. Provider plugins implement Agent-layer protocols (see Layer 2 "Agent providers"); non-agent plugins: `gh` (GitHub API client), `metrics` (run-local metrics writer + reader), `submit_molq` (job-submission CLI extension).

#### schemas (`src/molexp/schemas/`) — JSON Schemas for documents

- **Public surface:** `get_schema`, `list_schemas`, `SCHEMA_DIR`, `SchemaValidator`, `ValidationError`; JSON files (`asset.json`, `context.json`, `experiment.json`, `link.json`, `project.json`, `task_config.json`, `workflow.json`, `workflow_metadata.json`).
- **Style summary:** loose `dict[str, Any]` schemas; validator returns typed `ValidationError`.
- **Layer role:** Cross-cutting / document schemas (consumed by Workflow IR + Server).

#### git (`src/molexp/git/`) — async wrappers around the `git` binary

- **Public surface:** `ensure_clone`, `fetch`, `push`, `GitWorktreeManager`.
- **Style summary:** thin async wrappers around `asyncio.create_subprocess_exec("git", ...)`; no third-party git library; idempotent operations.
- **Layer role:** Cross-cutting / git infrastructure (per-issue worktree pattern for the agent layer).

#### Top-level files (`src/molexp/`) — entry, logging, monitor

- **Public surface:** `__init__.py` re-exports user-facing hierarchy (`Workspace`, `Project`, `Experiment`, `Run`, `RunContext`, `GridSpace`, `UniformSpace`, `ParamSpace`, `entry`, `Logger`, `get_logger`); lazy `__getattr__` for `workspace` / `workflow` / `plugins`; `entry.py` (`molexp.entry`); `monitor.py`, `tree_monitor.py`, `_run_cancel.py`, `_logger.py`.
- **Style summary:** lazy attribute access keeps `import molexp` cheap; `__version__ = "0.3.0"`; `mollog`-based logging.
- **Layer role:** Cross-cutting / package root + monitoring helpers.

<!-- mol:map:managed end -->
